name: A break...
description:
Riozs I was not planning to make a bot today but I did just for you.

Anyway, behold Quelana from dark souls one or remastered, since no one has made one of her. Basically you get the chance to be comforted by her after everything you went through.

For POV, chosen undead is heavily recommended but there is enough wiggle room for some kind of adventurer.

Link to artist and image
creator: Twinsx2
